title: Meta Platforms (META): ‘Dead Money’ or Best Cheap AI Stock?  – Retail Investors Debate
excerpt: To gauge where retail sentiment stands on major AI stocks, we scoured Reddit investing communities where retail traders debate stock picks and swap theses in...
content_html:
To gauge where retail sentiment stands on major AI stocks, we scoured Reddit investing communities where retail traders debate stock picks and swap theses in real time. Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) was a clear favorite of many long-term retail investors. The stock is down roughly 4% this year, but many Redditors believe now is the time to buy.

What Meta Does and Why It's Down

Meta owns Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and makes almost all its money selling ads across them. The drop this year traces to one thing: Mark Zuckerberg is pouring billions into AI data centers, and investors aren't sure it pays off.

Why Bulls Are Buying

The simple case: Meta's revenue grew 33% year over year last quarter. One Redditor put it bluntly: "I'm at $300 cost basis and am never selling META. I'll just buy the dip and keep buying." Bulls argue the market is punishing capex fear, not the actual business.

There's a more specific version of this bull case too. Meta is reportedly exploring leasing excess GPU capacity to third parties and has already struck a $21 billion expanded AI infrastructure deal with CoreWeave, plus talks for a compute deal worth up to $10 billion with Anthropic over two years. Bulls see this as Meta turning a cost center into a second revenue stream, becoming a "neocloud" instead of just a spender. That matters because the market has historically distrusted Zuckerberg's capital allocation after the Metaverse bet, and some bulls argue this pivot is the first capex-related news the market has actually cheered rather than punished. Price targets from bulls run as high as $1,011 and around $1,000, with Meta Glasses flagged as a second catalyst as smart-glasses adoption ramps.

Why Bears Aren't Buying It

The bear case centers on a competitive threat from China. Moonshot AI, a Beijing-based lab, just released Kimi K3, a new 2.8-trillion-parameter AI model with a 1-million-token context window and native image understanding, priced at $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million output tokens. Moonshot is making the model "open-weight," meaning anyone will be able to download and run it themselves once the full weights are released on July 27. Benchmark testing shows Meta's own AI model, Muse Spark, scoring below Kimi K3, as well as below GPT-5.6 and Claude Fable 5. Bears argue Kimi K3's release accelerates the commoditization of mid-tier AI models and undercuts Meta's pricing power in anything beyond its own ad platform.

Bears also point to history: Reality Labs, the metaverse division Zuckerberg renamed the company after, has burned through more than $80 billion in cumulative losses since 2020. Stock-based compensation ran $20.4 billion in 2025, close to 44% of free cash flow. One Redditor summed it up: Meta is "dead money" until capex stops. One bear rating puts fair value at just $570 to $635, well below where the stock trades today.

Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) was a clear favorite of many long-term retail investors. The stock is down roughly 4% this year, but many Redditors believe now is the time to buy. One bear rating puts fair value at just $570 to $635, well below where the stock trades today.

sentences.en: Bears also point to history: Reality Labs, the metaverse division Zuckerberg renamed the company after, has burned through more than $80 billion in cumulative losses since 2020.
sentences.zh: 看空者还提到了历史：扎克伯格将公司更名为虚拟宇宙部门 Reality Labs，自 2020 年以来累计亏损已超过 800 亿美元。

sentences.en: Stock-based compensation ran $20.4 billion in 2025, close to 44% of free cash flow.
sentences.zh: 2025 年，基于股票的薪酬为 204 亿美元，接近自由现金流的 44%。

sentences.en: One Redditor summed it up: Meta is "dead money" until capex stops.
sentences.zh: 一位 Reddit 用户总结道：在资本支出停止之前，Meta 是“死钱”。

sentences.en: One bear rating puts fair value at just $570 to $635, well below where the stock trades today.
sentences.zh: 一项熊市评级显示其公允价值仅为 570 至 635 美元，远低于该股目前的交易价格。

content_html_zh:
为了衡量散户对主要人工智能股票的看法，我们搜索了 Reddit 投资社区，其中散户交易者实时讨论股票选择并交换观点。 Meta Platforms（纳斯达克股票代码：META）显然是许多长期散户投资者的最爱。 该股今年下跌了约 4%，但许多 Reddit 用户认为现在是买入时机。

Meta 的用途以及它为何被关闭

Meta 拥有 Facebook、Instagram 和 WhatsApp，其收入几乎全部来自于在这些应用程序上销售广告。 今年的下降可以追溯到一件事：马克·扎克伯格正在向人工智能数据中心投入数十亿美元，而投资者不确定它是否会得到回报。

多头为何买入

简单的例子：上个季度 Meta 的收入同比增长 33%。 一位 Reddit 用户直言不讳地说：“我以 300 美元的成本为基础，从不销售 META。 我会逢低买入并继续买入。” 看多者认为，市场正在惩罚资本支出的恐惧，而不是实际的业务。

这个牛市案例还有一个更具体的版本。 据报道，Meta 正在探索将多余的 GPU 容量租赁给第三方，并已与 CoreWeave 达成了一项价值 210 亿美元的人工智能基础设施扩展协议，并与 Anthropic 就两年内价值高达 100 亿美元的计算协议进行了谈判。 看涨者认为，Meta 将成本中心转变为第二个收入来源，成为“新云”而不仅仅是消费者。 这很重要，因为在元宇宙押注之后，市场历来不信任扎克伯格的资本配置，而且一些多头认为，这一转向是市场实际上欢呼而不是惩罚的第一个与资本支出相关的消息。 多头的价格目标高达 1,011 美元至 1,000 美元左右，随着智能眼镜采用率的上升，Meta Glasses 被认为是第二个催化剂。

为什么熊不买账

悲观的理由集中在来自中国的竞争威胁上。 总部位于北京的 Moonshot AI 实验室刚刚发布了 Kimi K3，这是一种新的 2.8 万亿参数人工智能模型，具有 100 万代币上下文窗口和本机图像理解，定价为每百万输入代币 3 美元和每百万输出代币 15 美元。 Moonshot 正在使该模型成为“开放权重”，这意味着一旦 7 月 27 日发布完整权重，任何人都可以自行下载并运行该模型。 基准测试显示，Meta 自己的 AI 模型 Muse Spark 的得分低于 Kimi K3，也低于 GPT-5.6 和 Claude Fable 5。 看空者认为 Kimi K3 的发布加速了中层人工智能模型的商品化，并削弱了 Meta 在其自有广告平台之外的任何领域的定价能力。

看空者还提到了历史：扎克伯格将公司更名为虚拟宇宙部门 Reality Labs，自 2020 年以来累计亏损已超过 800 亿美元。 2025 年，基于股票的薪酬为 204 亿美元，接近自由现金流的 44%。 一位 Reddit 用户总结道：在资本支出停止之前，Meta 是“死钱”。 一项熊市评级显示其公允价值仅为 570 至 635 美元，远低于该股目前的交易价格。
